title: centaurea incompta subsp. derventana
intro: Centaurea incompta subsp. derventana, also known as Derventan Knapweed, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. It is primarily found in the Balkan Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's extracts have been shown to exhibit health benefits such as wound healing, antimicrobial properties, and potential anti-cancer effects. In herbal preparations, Centaurea incompta subsp. derventana is often used as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds, or in combination with other herbs for its medicinal properties.
